evaluations.query: Convert Figma Variables to W3C design tokens with light and dark mode support
expected_behavior: Exports Figma Variables via REST API, not manual copy
Uses W3C DTCG format with $type, $value, $description fields
Maps Figma Variable modes to $extensions.mode for light/dark themes
Runs Style Dictionary to transform tokens into CSS custom properties and Tailwind theme

evaluations.query: Extract a Button component specification from Figma with all variants and states
expected_behavior: Creates TypeScript interface matching Figma component properties exactly
Maps Figma variant properties to string union types with correct values
Documents all interactive states including hover, focus, active, disabled, and loading
Includes Figma component URL in JSDoc for design traceability

evaluations.query: Convert a Figma card list with Auto Layout to CSS Flexbox with responsive wrapping
expected_behavior: Uses CSS gap for item spacing instead of margin on children
Maps Fill container sizing to flex: 1 1 0%, not percentage widths
Preserves min-width and max-width constraints from Figma for responsive behavior
Uses flex-wrap: wrap when Figma Auto Layout has wrapping enabled

evaluations.query: Set up visual regression testing to compare production UI against Figma designs
expected_behavior: Configures Applitools Eyes with Playwright for automated visual comparison
Captures multiple viewport widths (375, 768, 1280) for responsive verification
Integrates visual regression checks into CI pipeline on every pull request
Uses appropriate match levels (Strict for components, Layout for dynamic pages)

evaluations.query: Inspect a Figma component in Dev Mode and extract exact spacing, typography, and color values
expected_behavior: Reads spacing values from Auto Layout panel, not by visual measurement
Extracts font family, size, weight, and line height from the Type section
References Variable names for colors instead of raw hex values
Exports icons as SVG at 1x using the Dev Mode export panel

evaluations.query: Half the components in our Figma file use detached styles with hardcoded hex values instead of Figma Variables. How do I handle the handoff?
expected_behavior: Identifies detached styles as a design-side issue that requires mapping hardcoded values to the closest existing design tokens
Does not blindly convert hardcoded hex values into new tokens without checking for existing equivalents
Recommends flagging detached styles back to the design team for resolution before code implementation
Provides a mapping strategy to approximate hardcoded values to the nearest semantic token

evaluations.query: Our Figma token export pipeline fails with a 403 error. The REST API returns 'invalid token' but we haven't changed the token.
expected_behavior: Checks whether the Figma personal access token has expired or been revoked by an admin
Recommends verifying the token's file access scope matches the target Figma file
Does not suggest hardcoding a new token directly in the pipeline script or CI config
Advises storing the Figma API token in a secrets manager or CI environment variable with rotation

evaluations.query: Our developer committed the Figma REST API access token directly in the design token sync script checked into the repo
expected_behavior: Warns that the committed token must be revoked immediately since it is exposed in git history
Recommends moving the token to an environment variable or CI secrets, never inline in source code
Advises using git filter-branch or BFG Repo Cleaner to remove the token from git history
Suggests adding a pre-commit hook to scan for token patterns and block accidental credential commits
